title: Restore truthful deterministic release gates
forbidden_changes: Changing historical benchmark numbers without authoritative evidence
Claiming a validation command passed when it was not run
Lowering warning or validation severity to conceal defects
deliverables: Repository hygiene based on tracked source files
Accurate task and Foundation status metadata
Zero-error formatting checking and test gates
acceptance_tests: Repository hygiene ignores untracked local build caches but rejects tracked generated output
Task counts and documented validation results match current authoritative outputs
Code builds with the declared MSRV
cargo fmt check and release verification pass
The full repository validation matrix passes
security_requirements: Hygiene checks must continue detecting committed secrets and generated artifacts
Status documents must not overstate test or security completion
